chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-286 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE: 1. For order on office objection No.1, 5 & 26. 2. For order on CMA No.1370/2024 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 15th March 2024 Mr. Subhan Javed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Asst. A.G. Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Pursuant to Court’s Notice Mr. Adil Umer Kalhoro, Excise & Taxation Officer, Motor Registering Authority, Karachi has shown appearance and filed reply/comments, which are taken on record, copy of which has been supplied to the learned counsel for petitioner, however, submits that entire details of subject vehicle as per previous owner has been mentioned in the reply and prima facie the subject vehicle is not required in any criminal case, therefore, petitioner will approach respondent alongwith relevant documents and the vehicle for physical verification the needful will be done within seven days. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with such statement. According, instant Constitutional Petition stands disposed of with the direction to the petitioner to approach the respondent alongwith relevant documents and the subject vehicle for physical verification, whereafter, the needful will be done within seven days. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
